title: Fields & Beds

validation.bedAreaExceedsField: The sum of bed areas ({{sum}} m²) exceeds the field's area ({{max}} m²). Please adjust the areas.
validation.areaMustBePositive: The area must be greater than 0.
validation.areaTooLarge: The entered area is too large. Please enter a smaller value.
validation.lengthNonNegative: Length must be greater than or equal to 0.
validation.widthNonNegative: Width must be greater than or equal to 0.
validation.lengthNotANumber: Length must be a valid number.
validation.widthNotANumber: Width must be a valid number.
validation.duplicateFieldName: A field with this name already exists at this location.
validation.duplicateBedName: A bed with this name already exists in this field.

confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this entry?

footer.multipleLocations: Expand locations/fields to add new fields/beds

tooltips.calculatedArea: The area is calculated automatically from length × width and cannot be edited directly.

messages.noBedsHintAfterIcon: icon on the respective field. It appears on hover.
messages.noBedsHintMobile: Long-press the respective field and select "Add bed".
messages.missingDimensionsHint: Length and width are important for area calculations, seed demand, and crop planning.
messages.missingDimensionsHintOptional: You can add the values later.
messages.missingDimensionsCellTooltip: This value is required for the area calculation and any planning based on it.
messages.unsavedMissingName: Row was not saved because the name is missing.
messages.unsavedInvalidRowsNavigationWarning: There is an unsaved row without a name. It will be lost when you leave the page.
messages.unsavedRowEditNavigationWarning: A row is currently being edited. The changes will be lost when you leave the page.
messages.locationsNowVisible: Locations are now shown because multiple locations exist.

prompts.selectLocationForField:
Please enter the location ID for the new field:

addAdditionalLocation.title: Add another location
addAdditionalLocation.description: Locations help you manage areas at different places separately. For a project with only one place, you don't need to set up anything else.

emptyAreas.title: No growing areas yet
emptyAreas.description: The main location isn't available for this project yet. Afterwards you can record fields and beds there.
emptyAreas.missingLocationDescription: The main location isn't available for this project yet.
emptyAreas.missingFieldSingleLocationDescription: Create a field to get started.
emptyAreas.additionalLocationHint: If you manage areas in multiple places, you can also
